skill.epicfight.combat_mastery_i.tooltip: You have grown more adept at seizing opportunities between offense and evasion. You can dodge while attacking, or follow up with an attack after dodging.
skill.epicfight.combat_mastery_ii.toolti: For a short time after dodging, sprinting will enter the [Dash] state. While in [Dash], stamina will be continuously consumed.
skill.epicfight.katana_skill.tooltip:
§8Attacks build stance stacks. Sweeping Edge increases the cap. Current weapon cap: §e%s§8.

§8Idle Cast: Swap between §c[Unsheathed]§8 and §b[Sheathed]§8 stances for free.
§8Attack Cast: §e[Flow]§8, granting invincibility frames.

§c[Unsheathed Skill]§8: Consumes all stacks to deal multiplied damage based on the number of stacks.
§b[Sheathed Skill]§8: Consumes all stacks to unleash (stacks - 1) extra dimensional slashes
skill.epicfight.scythe_skill.tooltip:
§8Attempt to grab a target in front of you. Upon success, you may follow up with:
  §6Decapitate §a[Left Click]§8: Deals (3 × Weapon Damage + Target's Max HP) as damage.
  §6Hymn of the Night §a[Right Click]§8: Slams the target down, dealing (8 × Weapon Damage × 0.1) Dark Magic damage and healing for the same amount.
§8If the grab fails, a powerful slash is performed instead.
